title: Name Missing From Voter List
description: Diagnostic steps and remedies if your name is not on the electoral roll.

start.content: Have you previously registered to vote and had an EPIC (Voter ID) card?

never_registered.content: If you have never registered, your name will not be on the list. You need to register as a first-time voter using Form 6.

have_epic.content: Did you search the electoral roll using your EPIC number exactly as it appears on your card?

search_epic.content: Please search the Electoral Search portal using your EPIC number. Sometimes names are misspelled, but searching by EPIC number is the most reliable method.

search_details.content: Have you moved to a new assembly constituency since you last voted?

moved.content: If you moved to a different constituency, your name might have been deleted from the old list. You must submit **Form 8** to shift your residence and get your name added to your new constituency's list.

not_moved.content: If you haven't moved and your name was deleted without notice, it might be an error or due to non-verification. You should contact your Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) or submit **Form 6** to re-register.
